zh.Longstone, Leicestershire, England: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: Christian Longstone於1140年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾。她與Wischard Ledet結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登。

nameMeanings.name: Longstone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Longson
meanings: English: habitational name from Longstone in Derbyshire. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Lang (genitive Langes) + Old English dūn ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: Christian Longstone was born in 1140, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. She married Wischard Ledet. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.Longstone, Leicestershire, England: イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Christian Longstoneは1140年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた。Wischard Ledetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチップイング ワーデンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Longstone(은)는 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Wischard Ledet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 치핀그 워든에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Christian Longstone родилась в 1140 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wischard Ledet. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности чиппинг варден, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
